title: IMAGINATION
description: There is only one way for you to find out what this modpack is really about.
body:
# Project IMAGINATION 
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f441587a7349f072c7e8b43d3da9e48a9bc9079.png)
Originally crafted for a small group of friends for a private SMP.
Project IMAGINATION has now been made available to the public. 
Experience the modpack firsthand and see if it suits your style.



## Key Features
| **Category**               | **Description**                                                                                         |
|----------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **Optimization**           | Your game will run smoother because of our custom optimization modset. Less lag, more fps |
| **META Changes**       | Your GUIs, settings, keybinds will be less of a pain now. Breaking veins happens instantly. The settings are expanded. The game setup is 100% in your hands, making every tweak faster. |
| **Decoration & Building**  | From now you can build, build, build and never get the creativity block... because there are new blocks and tools for building. There isn't an overflood of choice tho, all perfectly balanced. |
| **Essentials that Should Be in Vanilla** | Your gameplay is enriched by features that don't change but rather expand the vanilla feeling. These additions feel like they belong, bringing in elements that should have always been there without altering the essence of what makes Minecraft great. |
| **Light Touch of Technology** | Your tasks become easier with the introduction of simple machines and automation. More convenience and efficiency to your gameplay, helping you accomplish more while maintaining the simplicity of the game. |

---

## Information

1. **Feel free to use this as a base for your modpack under one circumstance.** Use its name as a prefix - for example "IMAGINATION: Technified." and provide a link to this one.
2. **Custom-made KubeJS scripts, resource packs, and datapacks are not under copyright.** They can be freely used.

---
